constraints.message: narrative length must be between 1 and 16384 characters (matches DelegationVote.reasoning bounds).
constraints.evaluation_note: Bounds check on dissent rationale text; matches DelegationVoteSchema reasoning convention.

constraints.message: Each cited_claim_ids entry must be a non-empty string.
constraints.evaluation_note: Optional grounding citations; if present, each must be a non-empty string. Cross-record existence (does the claim_id resolve to a PanelDecisionArtifact.claims entry?) is NOT enforced — consumer-side per NF-1 (library/runtime boundary) and R6 (cross-record existence is consumer state-store responsibility).
